insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions, and the block_progress capability it depends on, are deprecated starting in version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work on versions prior to 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and replace the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook with alternative solutions. They should also ensure their extensions are compatible with version 2026-07 and later. The deprecation may affect the functionality of existing extensions, so thorough testing is recommended. Developers can use the Checkout UI extensions API to find alternative solutions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions, potentially affecting the user experience. Merchants should work with their developers to ensure a smooth transition to the new API version.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of useBuyerJourneyIntercept is significant because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are crucial for merchants to customize their checkout experiences. Developers must adapt to the change to ensure their extensions remain functional and provide a good user experience.

updates.summary: The Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.5.0, introducing new store commands for listing and creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.1, fixing issues with command metadata and build errors.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: The @shopify/create-hydrogen package has been updated to version 5.0.38, adding an explicit app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: The skeleton package has been updated to version 2026.4.5, adding an explicit app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has been introduced, aiming to increase trust in the partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles changes to Action extensions with fewer breaking changes, giving developers more control over field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now updates Action runtime URLs automatically, ensuring that workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
The Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, fixing issues with Javy dependencies and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

recap.headline: Shopify updates Hydrogen, POS Extensions, and App Pricing with new features and improvements

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including new store commands, improved error handling, and explicit app aliases in new projects. These updates aim to enhance the development experience and fix existing issues.

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI Updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support background extension targets, allowing for event observation and background logic without rendering UI. Additionally, POS UI extensions will use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts starting with API version 2026-07.

themes.title: App Pricing, Shopify Flow, and Security
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Shopify Flow also received updates, including changes to Action extensions and automatic updates to Action runtime URLs.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use explicit app aliases
Review and update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Verify identity as a Shopify Partner
